Core Capabilities

Built For Everyday Finance

A complete digital payment stack designed for secure onboarding, fast movement of funds, and transparent transaction tracking.

Bank to Wallet

Instantly add funds from linked bank accounts with resilient settlement and realtime status visibility.

P2P Transfers

Send money instantly to verified recipients with simple lookup, confirmation previews, and secure execution.

Bill & Recharge

Handle recurring payments and mobile recharges with a clean interface and consistent transfer experience.

How CoinPay Works

01

Create Account

Sign up in minutes and verify your profile with a secure onboarding flow.

02

Fund Wallet

Add money from your linked account and monitor every state in real time.

03

Pay Instantly

Transfer, recharge, and manage transactions through one trusted interface.

About CoinPay

A Modern Platform For Trusted Digital Payments

CoinPay is designed to combine banking-grade security with a consumer-friendly product experience. Our mission is simple: make moving money feel instant, transparent, and dependable.

Security-first architecture with encrypted flows.
Fast transaction processing and reliable status tracking.
Built for users and businesses across regions.
